fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number.
The program copies the number from the Routing No. field in the Routing Line.
The program uses this field internally to assign the routing personnel to the routing lines.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different routing personnel lines.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the personnel, such as the names or the professions.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version code of the routing that the routing personnel is related to.
The program copies the code from the Version Code field in the Routing Version table. If the routing personnel is not set up for a routing version, this field will be empty.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number that this routing personnel refers to.
The program uses this field internally to assign the routing personnel to the operation.
